TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qaljapang ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 85 buwan, 223 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 211 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 88%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Qaljapang hya' ga Qu chn.la love vn. tay 'llaw na Qaljapang hya' ga Pangwi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Qaljapang ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qaljapaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na qaljapaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n. taj ʔllaw na qaljapaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa paŋwi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ qaljapaŋ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Qaljapang ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 85 buwan, 223 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 211 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 88%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Qaljapang hya' ga Qu chn.la love vn. tay 'llaw na Qaljapang hya' ga Pangwi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Qaljapang ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qaljapaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na qaljapaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n. taj ʔllaw na qaljapaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa paŋwi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ qaljapaŋ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
